title: monitor-and-check execute-task better_alternative_exists
summary: Agent attempted to monitor a cloud service's status by scraping a public status page, but the page structure changed and the scraper broke.

evidence.desired_outcome: Monitor the operational status of a cloud service and alert on incidents.
evidence.symptom: The web scraper broke after the status page was redesigned. The CSS selectors no longer match, and the agent cannot maintain the scraper.
evidence.context: The service provider offers an official status API with structured incident data, but the agent was not aware of it.

environment.notes: API key available but not configured.

evidence.failed_step: Web scraper CSS selectors no longer match redesigned status page
reproduction_steps: Ran scraper — selectors failed to match
Updated selectors for new page structure — different elements broke next day

inference.why_current_path_failed: Web scraping a status page is a fragile approach. The page structure can change at any time, breaking the scraper. An official API provides structured, stable data.
inference.best_candidate_route_detail: Configure the cloud-status-api-mcp connector using the available API key. This provides structured incident data without the fragility of web scraping.

resolution.follow_up_notes: Configured cloud-status-api-mcp with API key. Monitoring is stable and data is structured.
